name: Rosalyn Carter's Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, water, and corn syrup in a large pot.
2. Boil the mixture until it reaches the soft-ball stage (235°F or 112°C on a candy thermometer), then add peanuts.
3. Stir continuously until the syrup turns golden brown.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter, vanilla extract, and remaining peanuts until butter melts completely.
5. Pour the mixture onto two greased cookie sheets with sides.
6. As the mixture begins to harden around the edges, work quickly to pull it apart into thin pieces.
>From the recipe files of Carole Walberg
